issues.description: Condition is incomplete. Card requires BOTH [Kotori] AND [Satori] on board. DSL only checks for Kotori. Must use compound condition with both card names.
Target scope is incorrect. Card says 'up to 1' opponent character, implying optional selection (0 or 1). Should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOptional' or equivalent optional targeting.
Activation cost not modeled. Card requires DON!! −2 and may rest this Character. DSL must account for cost constraints (likely in separate cost object or trigger context).
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn', but verify against card text: effect lasts until end of current turn only.
